sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11731" key="a)peirktiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπειρκτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n11731.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keeping out,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg007:23:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Sens.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
